title: eriocaulon miquelianum var. lutchuense
intro: Eriocaulon miquelianum var. lutchuense is a type of plant species that belongs to the Eriocaulaceae family, commonly known as the pipewort or umbrella plant due to its unique umbrella-like inflorescence. This plant is traditionally used in medicine in certain regions, particularly in East Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriocaulon miquelianum var. lutchuense include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction by boiling the roots or leaves in water, and it is also used in some regions as a component of traditional remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
